---
title: "About"
comments: false
---

I'm [Francis DiTraglia](https://www.ditraglia.com), an applied econometrician at the University of Oxford. As an undergraduate, I hated both my first statistics course and my first econometrics course. Now I blog about both topics in my free time.

The site uses [Quarto](https://quarto.org), [Utterances](https://utteranc.es) for comments, and [GoatCounter](https://econometrics.goatcounter.com) for cookie-free analytics with a public dashboard.
